name: Innovid
description: Independent global measurement and attribution platform for converged TV, CTV, OTT and digital after acquiring TVSquared.

seo.title: Innovid — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: Innovid: Independent global measurement and attribution platform for converged TV, CTV, OTT and digital after acquiring TVSquared.

when_to_use: CTV and OTT attribution across linear TV, streaming, and digital for advertisers
Independent measurement of converged TV campaign reach and frequency
TVSquared integration for linear TV ad attribution tied to digital outcomes
Cross-screen TV-to-digital performance reporting for brand advertisers

pros: Independent measurement across CTV, OTT and digital
cons: Less relevant to non-video app marketers
Measurement and creative under one roof can feel conflicted
review.verdict: Legitimate converged-TV measurement option, but overscoped for standard mobile app UA teams.
review.best_for: Brand advertisers running CTV, OTT and linear who need independent cross-screen measurement.
review.not_for: Mobile-only UA teams with no TV or video brand budget.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
